reason: Agent QA-20260528-122027-vidl responded correctly to the math question, providing the answer "4" to 2+2.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with sidebar showing two agents.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260528-122027-vidl" in the sidebar — agent details page opened and displayed the agent configuration.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — agent status showed "idle" which meets the requirement.
Clicked on message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — message was successfully entered in the input field.
Clicked send button — message was sent, a new session "Simple Math Question Session" was created, and agent status changed to "working".
Waited for agent response — agent responded in approximately 1 second with the answer "4" prominently displayed in the chat view.
Verified response mentions "4" — response clearly displays "4" as the answer to 2+2, and status shows "Worked for 1s" indicating completion.
